item.title: ChatLoopBackOff Episode 58 (​Helm)
item.author: CNCF [Cloud Native Computing Foundation]
item.content:encoded:
A CNCF graduated project since 2020, Helm is an open source package manager for Kubernetes. It provides the ability to provide, share, and use software on clusters. It is a highly customizable tool, and it abstracts the application deployment to a simple configuration file.
Originally created in 2015, Helm is driving into 2025 with plans of a major new version, Helm 4, which has brought in new contributors and users who are passionate about application deployment on Kubernetes.
Join CNCF ambassador Satyam Soni as he explores Helm for the first time.

item.title: GPU-powered AI on VMs, Kubernetes & Bare Metal with Cozystack
item.author: CNCF [Cloud Native Computing Foundation]
item.content:encoded:
Don't miss out! Join us at our next Flagship Conference: KubeCon + CloudNativeCon events in Hong Kong, China (June 10-11); Tokyo, Japan (June 16-17); Hyderabad, India (August 6-7); Atlanta, US (November 10-13). Connect with our current graduated, incubating, and sandbox projects as the community gathers to further the education and advancement of cloud native computing. Learn more at https://kubecon.io
Links: https://cozystack.io/docs/getting-started
